hero.heading: Research
hero.tagline: Strategic research and targeted advocacy to transform Britain's economic landscape through innovative policy frameworks

policy_areas.heading: Our Priority Policy areas
policy_areas.description: Strategic research and targeted advocacy to transform Britain's economic landscape through innovative policy frameworks

job_guarantee.heading: The Job Guarantee
job_guarantee.description: Our inaugural policy paper, published 25 February 2026, demonstrates how MMT can achieve full employment and price stability through a voluntary, counter-inflationary Job Guarantee.
job_guarantee.feature_1: Guarantee a paid public option at £15 per hour, centrally funded and locally delivered, open to anyone willing and able to work, with additional, non-displacing roles that serve community, care and climate needs
job_guarantee.feature_2: Operate as a counter-inflation automatic stabiliser by converting unemployment into a buffer of paid employment, using the Job Guarantee wage as a nominal anchor with annual formula updates and a triennial review
job_guarantee.feature_3: Deliver strong net fiscal and social returns through lower benefit spend, higher tax and NI receipts, and health savings, with phased rollout, local project pipelines, and independent evaluation before national scale

zirp.heading: Zero Interest Rate Policy (ZIRP)
zirp.description: A permanent 0% Central Bank Interest rate, with fiscal policy doing the steering
zirp.feature_1: Set Bank Rate at 0 percent, replace routine gilt issuance with reserves, cut interest costs and simplify debt management
zirp.feature_2: Manage demand through automatic stabilisers and targeted fiscal measures, use prudential tools to guide credit and protect financial stability
zirp.feature_3: Offer safe saving via NS&I and regulated products, publish a gilt market transition plan with clear timelines, risk controls, and reporting
zirp.wip_notice: We are currently working on a draft for this policy

briefings.heading: MMT Briefings
briefings.description: Our affiliated authors critique public economic commentary and rebut anti-MMT polemic with rigorous analysis.

approach.heading: Our Approach to policy Research
approach.description: Navigating complex economic and social landscapes through research and understanding informed by Modern Monetary Theory.
approach.card_1_body: We blend academic rigor with practical application. Our methodology cuts through theoretical noise to deliver actionable insights. We challenge assumptions and seek truth.
approach.card_2_body: We bridge academic theory and real-world impact. Our research goes beyond traditional boundaries, connecting scholarly analysis with grassroots movements. We transform knowledge into meaningful change.
approach.card_3_body: We employ interdisciplinary approaches that challenge conventional thinking. Our team combines deep analytical skills with on-the-ground experience. We don't just study problems, we seek solutions.
approach.card_4_body: Our research influences policy, challenges economic paradigms, and supports social transformation. We provide clear, evidence-based insights that drive meaningful dialogue and action.
approach.card_5_body: We believe in open research and collaborative knowledge creation. Our work is transparent, peer-reviewed, and designed to empower communities and policymakers alike.
